Hero.title: KlickIT
Hero.subtitle: Digital skills for all ages
Hero.description: We build bridges between people and digital tools

About.title: About us
About.description: KlickIT is a newly formed non-profit association (started 2025-07-07) by engaged parents. We are concerned that many children, young people, and elderly struggle to navigate the digital world.
About.mission: We create safe paths to digital competence and work towards a healthy, effective, and meaningful digital life – for all ages.

workshops.title: Workshops in digital skills
workshops.description: Practical workshops that provide tools to navigate the digital world with confidence.

courses.title: Courses for children, young people, and adults
courses.description: Tailored courses for all ages that build digital understanding step by step.

collaboration.title: Collaboration with schools & IT industry
collaboration.description: We create bridges between education and business for better digital competence.

elderly.title: Digital support for the elderly
elderly.description: Special focus on helping elderly feel confident with digital technology.

focus.title: Focus on health, everyday life, future careers
focus.description: We connect digital skills to real needs in everyday life and the future.

parents.title: Close collaboration with engaged parents
parents.description: We actively involve parents and young people in the association's development work to create relevant solutions.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.cta: Want to collaborate, contribute, or just say hi? Feel free to reach out.

UnderConstruction.title: Under construction
UnderConstruction.description: This website is under construction and will be launched soon. We welcome your ideas and collaborations in the meantime!
